  • Product Details

  • Ballistics
Product Details
Sierra Bullets® has partnered with SIG Sauer® to bring you the ultimate defense bullet line delivering optimal weight retention and expansion at all effective distances combined with Sierra’s world renowned accuracy. The line features a stacked hollow point bullet design with additional hollow point cavity. The #9990 was introduced in November 2015.
Specs
Ballistics
